name: Aluminium Windows & Curtain Wall Subcontract — Harbour Crest Residences

clauses.heading: Warranties
clauses.text: The Subcontractor warrants that the works will be fit for their intended purpose for the life of the building.

clauses.heading: Assessment of Payment Claims
clauses.text: Payment claims shall be assessed and certified within 30 business days of submission.

clauses.heading: Retention
clauses.text: Retention of 10% of each payment shall be held and released only upon issue of the Final Certificate.

clauses.heading: Notice of Delay
clauses.text: Any claim for an extension of time must be notified within 10 business days of the event giving rise to it.

clauses.heading: Liquidated Damages
clauses.text: Liquidated damages of HK$25,000 per day shall apply for late completion, with no cap on the aggregate amount.

clauses.heading: Limitation of Liability
clauses.text: The Subcontractor's total liability under this Subcontract is capped at the Subcontract value.

clauses.heading: Termination for Default
clauses.text: The Contractor may terminate this Subcontract if a default is not remedied within 5 days of written notice.

clauses.heading: Defects Liability Period
clauses.text: The Defects Liability Period is 24 months from the date of Practical Completion.

clauses.heading: Payment Conditionality
clauses.text: Payment to the Subcontractor is conditional upon the Contractor first receiving payment from the Employer.

clauses.heading: Site Hoarding and Signage
clauses.text: The Subcontractor shall provide branded hoarding and signage at the site perimeter as directed by the Contractor.
